title: Add SRTAudio  Video IA Pro to video_audio
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: The hive goes Hollywood
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped! SRTAudio Video IA Pro turns your MP3s and SRT files into browser-based videos using our Audio API and Whisper.
gist.summary: Added SRTAudio Video IA Pro to the community app showcase under the video and audio category.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use a new community-built tool that generates browser-based videos from audio files and subtitles.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about an app that combines audio (MP3/WAV), subtitles (SRT), and video generation. Visual symbols: a retro TV or film projector, audio waveforms, musical notes, a clapperboard. Characters: Polly the bee wearing a director's beret or holding a clapperboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny director's beret, holding a pixelated movie clapperboard next to a retro TV screen showing colorful audio waveforms. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny director's beret, holding a pixelated movie clapperboard next to a retro TV screen showing colorful audio waveforms.
